{
  "preconditions": [
    "a and b must be comparable",
    "a and b must support equality operation"
  ],
  "postconditions": [
    "returns True if a is equal to b",
    "returns False if a is not equal to b"
  ],
  "edge_cases": [
    "a and b are of different types",
    "a and b are NaN (Not a Number) values",
    "a and b are infinity values"
  ]
}

preconditions: a and b must be comparable
a and b must support equality operation
postconditions: returns True if a is equal to b

edge_cases: a and b are of different types

a and b are infinity values

preconditions: a must be a hashable type
b must be a hashable type
postconditions: a == b if and only if eq(a, b) returns True
not a == b if and only if eq(a, b) returns False
edge_cases: eq(a, a) returns True for any a
eq(a, b) returns False if a and b are of different types

preconditions: a must be comparable to b

edge_cases: eq(a, b) returns False if a is not equal to b
eq(a, None) returns False if a is not None
eq(None, b) returns False if b is not None
